explanation: The command substitutes the '/i:' flag with '-i:' to test if the Sigma rule detects both forms. This is a valid mutation using substitution and still triggers the rule.
Removes quotes around the path to test if the rule still detects the '/i' flag without additional syntax. This is a safe mutation using omission.
Uses a URL instead of a local path to test if the rule still detects the '/i' flag. This is a valid mutation using recoding.
Shortens the path to test if the rule still detects the '/i' flag when the path is minimal. This is a valid mutation using omission.
